title: ornithoboea emarginata
intro: Ornithoboea emarginata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Himalayas. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ornithoboea emarginata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used in herbal teas, infusions, or dried and used as a supplement.
